Home.heroDescription: Access products from anywhere in the world — from local gems to limited editions — delivered by real travelers. Simple, secure, and personal.
Home.howItWorksDescription: Buyers request products from abroad, travelers pick them up, and our team coordinates the handover. Four steps from request to doorstep.
Home.step1Description: Browse or create a request for the product you want from anywhere in the world.
Home.step2Description: A traveler picks up your request and confirms the details securely through the app.
Home.step3Description: Once the traveler returns, we coordinate pickup and deliver the item to your door.
Home.step4Description: For luxury or special items, our concierge team handles sourcing, quality checks, and delivery.
Home.loyaltyDescription: Earn points every time you shop or travel. Climb tiers, unlock perks, and enjoy benefits designed for our most active members.
Home.silverDescription: Your starting tier with instant rewards on every order.
Home.goldDescription: Faster perks and priority support as you level up.
Home.platinumDescription: Premium benefits for our most active members.
Home.diamondDescription: Our highest tier with exclusive VIP privileges.
Home.travelerDescription: Pick up items for buyers along your journey and earn on every trip. Your travel plans, your schedule — Shpper just adds income to the itinerary.
Home.tripPlannerDescription: Publish your upcoming trips so buyers can match with you.
Home.cockpitDescription: Your central hub for managing trips, requests, and earnings.
Home.requestsDescription: Browse and respond to buyer requests.
Home.globalMarketplaceDescription: Browse unique items from travelers worldwide — local specialties, limited editions, and hard-to-find products.
Home.mobileFirstDescription: Full-featured apps for iOS and Android. Shop and travel on the go.
Home.ecoFriendlyDescription: Sustainable delivery using existing traveler luggage space — no extra cargo flights.
Home.readyDescription: Download Shpper on iOS or Android and start accessing products from anywhere in the world.
Home.testimonialsDescription: Real stories from the buyers and travelers who use Shpper.
Home.testimonial1Text: I ordered a limited edition perfume from Paris through Shpper. The traveler was amazing — communicated the whole way. Got it within a week of their return!
Home.testimonial2Text: I travel for work monthly and Shpper lets me earn extra on every trip. The app is easy to use and payments come through quickly after delivery.
Home.testimonial3Text: The concierge service is a game-changer for luxury items. They handled everything — sourcing, quality check, and delivery. Worth every dirham.
Home.testimonial4Text: I use Shpper both ways — as a traveler when I fly and as a buyer when I want something from abroad. The community is genuinely helpful.

About.title: About Us
About.heroTitle: The Future of Global Shopping and Shipping
About.heroDescription: Shpper connects buyers with travelers to create a faster, greener, and more personal way to shop and ship across borders.
About.p2pDescription: Our network matches people who want to send or receive items with travelers already heading to those destinations. By using spare luggage space, we offer a more sustainable alternative to traditional shipping.
About.shoppingDescription: Travelers bring back unique items and local specialties directly from their destinations. With our upcoming Marketplace, you'll be able to explore curated products from trusted sellers — all within the Shpper platform.
About.tagline: We do it for you with love!
About.journeyDescription: What started as an idea in 2022 has grown into an active community of buyers and travelers across the globe. We improve the platform every week with one goal: make it easier for anyone to access products from anywhere. We're just getting started — and we'd love for you to be part of it.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.description: Answers to common questions about orders, payments, shipping, and using the Shpper platform.
Faq.buyerQ1: How do I create an order?
Faq.buyerA1: From the homepage, tap 'Create Order' to submit a standard request. For luxury or special items, select 'Concierge' instead.
Faq.buyerA2: All major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay.
Faq.buyerA3: Delivery timing depends on the traveler's return date. Once they land, we schedule pickup and deliver to you — typically within 1 to 3 days.
Faq.buyerA4: Yes. Your order moves through five statuses: On the way, Landed, Pickup scheduled, Handed over, and Delivered.
Faq.buyerA5: Returns are accepted within 7 days of delivery. Contact our team with a valid reason to start the process.
Faq.buyerQ6: Can I send multiple requests at once?
Faq.buyerA6: Yes. You can send multiple requests for different items or the same item across multiple trips. If no traveler responds within 60 minutes, the request is automatically published to all travelers heading to your chosen destination.
Faq.buyerQ7: How does the Concierge Service work?
Faq.buyerA7: The Concierge Service handles luxury, high-value, or fragile items. Our team manages sourcing, quality checks, and coordination on your behalf.
Faq.buyerQ8: Can I cancel an order after submitting it?
Faq.buyerA8: Yes. Request cancellation in the app with a reason — the admin or traveler will review it.
Faq.buyerQ9: How does the Personal Shopper get paid?
Faq.buyerA9: Personal Shoppers are registered as travelers and receive earnings directly through their traveler account. Earnings are agreed upon at the start of each order.
Faq.travelerQ1: How much do I earn per trip?
Faq.travelerA1: Earnings are agreed between you and the buyer for each request. The minimum is 20 AED per trip, with no maximum limit.
Faq.travelerQ2: When do I receive my commission?
Faq.travelerA2: Once the item is delivered, the full amount — including the item cost and your commission — is released to your in-app wallet.
Faq.travelerQ3: Where do I see my requests?
Faq.travelerA3: Switch to your Traveler account in the app and tap 'Requests' in the menu bar. You can also find them under Request Chats.
Faq.travelerQ4: Can I withdraw my earnings to my bank account?
Faq.travelerA4: Yes. Once funds are in your wallet, withdraw to your bank account using your IBAN.
Faq.travelerQ5: What happens if I can't find the requested item?
Faq.travelerA5: Let the buyer know in the chat and cancel the order. If they're online, you can suggest alternatives together.
Faq.travelerQ6: What happens if the price is different in the store?
Faq.travelerA6: Price differences can be adjusted after purchase. Share the receipt and send a payment request to the buyer in the chat, or issue a refund for the difference.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Get in touch — we typically respond within 24 hours.
Contact.description: Whether you have a question about orders, partnerships, or the platform, we're here to help.
Contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

Footer.description: A peer-to-peer shopping platform connecting buyers with travelers worldwide. Based in Dubai, UAE.
